title: Scaffolding Delta - Universal
description: All Scaffolding delta packages on a single section
body:
# All Scaffolding Delta modules on a single place

*Show distance of scaffolding in game without press F3*

This resourcepack include 3 types :

- Fast package : a low impact visual indicator without modify original model

- Fancy package : a high impact visual indicator modifying original model 

- CTM module : apply CTM and work independently so can be included with other packages

### Required Optifine or any other mod support Optifine-CTM (continuity) to work CTM module
